data.content: Plan review approved. Plan is comprehensive and correctly identifies the fallback chain, root cause, and existing embedded bundle infrastructure. All 7 acceptance criteria are mapped to planned steps and child knots. Main risk (loader cycle) is properly mitigated. Child ordering 720e→bf17→040c is logical. No invariant violations, no security/performance concerns. Minor note: kno skill <state> resolution via current selected workflow is a reasonable approach.
